name: Setup React project structure
description: Create App.tsx with basic imports and state, and styles.css with globals.

name: Implement todo state and logic
description: Use useState for todos array. Functions: addTodo, toggleComplete, deleteTodo.

name: Build UI components
description: Input with submit, todo list rendering, each item with checkbox and delete button. Show remaining count.

description: Dark background, glass cards, backdrop blur, subtle borders, smooth animations.

name: Test and refine
description: Ensure all features work, responsive, and visually consistent.
